name: Angry Bean
short_description: Enter the world of Angry Bean: a frantic arcade game where armed beans face swarms of alien insects! Destroy enemies, collect weapons, and survive challenging stages.
detailed_description:
Enter the world of Angry Bean, a casual and challenging arcade game where your goal is to spend lots of ammo with access to lot of guns... lot of guns.

Inspired by Space Invaders, you control furious beans facing swarms of alien insects descending upon the screen. Shoot enemies, collect new weapons as you defeat them, and enjoy dynamic and strategic gameplay.

Explore dynamic stages, including an abandoned subway, dark sewers, a secret lab, and even the depths of hell.

With an intense and energetic soundtrack, packed with heavy guitars, Angry Bean promises fast-paced action and challenges that will put your skills to the test.

Welcome to the crazy world of Angry Bean

This is a game where angry beans face a galactic invasion in an explosive arcade! Angry Bean mixes frenetic action, retro style and lots of humor in an adventure of shootouts, colossal bosses and bizarre monsters!

The Story of the Game

The Earth is collapsing. Six planet-devouring cosmic entities have arrived to suck the planet's nutrients and wreak havoc. But they didn't count on the dormant fury... of two beans! Stan, the sarcastic and full of attitude blue bean, and Shan, the silly but courageous green bean, the two bean brothers join forces to face the galactic creatures and save the planet in a journey that goes from the streets to the ends of the void!

Gameplay

The game has simple 2D platform shooter gameplay. The player can move from side to side, shooting upwards at enemies that descend across the screen. Shoot at enemies, collect new weapons, shoot more, dodge projectiles, shoot some more and use unique abilities — but don't forget to shoot!

Arcade Shooter Style

Face waves of enemies while dodging projectiles, defeating bosses, collecting new weapons and spitting out lots of ammo!

Linear Progression Campaign

The player advances through themed stages, each with unique environments.

Fall Mechanics

At a certain point in each stage, the ground breaks and the player falls to the next, in a striking visual transition.
